indicators.name: Floor
indicators.rationale: The floor is made of wood, which can be slippery and may cause discomfort while working.

indicators.name: Window
indicators.rationale: The large window provides natural light, which can improve mood and productivity.

indicators.name: Sea View
indicators.rationale: The sea view can provide a calming and relaxing environment, which can enhance focus and creativity.

reasoning_summary: The space has a good balance of positive and negative factors for computer work. The large window and sea view provide a pleasant environment, but the slippery floor could be a concern.
